steps.title: Identify what the underlined portion does
steps.content: The underlined sentence describes Oliveira and colleagues as capitalizing on the research potential offered by a vast but hitherto relatively underutilized source of insight. This is evaluative — it tells us why their approach (using historical DNA from museum specimens) matters.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice B says it offers commentary on the significance of their approach — exactly what an evaluation of an underutilized resource is.

A is wrong: it doesn't list specific applications. C is wrong: it focuses on the methodology, not the findings. D is wrong: it celebrates the approach rather than explaining why it isn't used.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
